sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, msg String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(msg, ['\x57\x6f\x72\x6c\x64', '\x48\x65\x6c\x6c\x6f']) AS index FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET msg = '\x48\x69\x20\x77\x6f\x72\x6c\x64' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, multiSearchFirstIndexUTF8(msg, ['\x77\x6f\x72\x6c\x64', '\x58\x79']) AS index FROM test_strings WHERE index > 0;
